race.comment: THE JOURNO (3) has settled too far off them in both runs back but has been flashing home hard late. Peaking third-up and if he can take closer order from the low draw he will prove mighty tough to hold out. JUSTICA'S BONUS (2) is desperate to break through soon, making it two placings in a row last start when beaten less than a length at HQ. At his top now and gets in well again with the 3kg claim. FASHION DOG (8) settled back again last time here but lengthened nicely in the lane to finish a close third. Is another that should be hitting his straps now and if he can utilise the inside draw he could take this out. KUSHAN KHANIVALE (7) hasn't won for a long time but is yet to miss the frame over this track and trip from four attempts. Backs up quickly after missing narrowly last week. Keeping safe. ASTRODEAN (10) was good second-up at Bordertown in tough conditions when second. Okay last time when finishing a distant third. Keeping safe.
